---
title: "test_persona_logic_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_persona_logic_empire.py"
loc: 9
complexity: 1
logic_score: 9.15
style_score: 8.99
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 5.03
---

## Intent
The `test_persona_logic_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_persona_loading. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_persona_loading. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 9.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [src.core.utils](file://src.core.utils)

### Exports
- `test_persona_loading`
